review_checklist: Run the main user flow end-to-end — does it complete without errors?
Read the actual output — would Emerson immediately see something wrong?
Trace one data path end-to-end: input → processing → output
Test at realistic scale (not toy inputs)
Verify output actually exists (files on disk, DB records written)
notes: Deploy: git push to main auto-deploys GitHub Pages (~40s).
Public copy ONLY from the campaign doc VERSION FOR CLAUDE section; Figma copy is stale/aesthetics-only.
Old pre-rebrand version preserved at /old/ for comparison.
